2022-23 George Washington Revolutionaries Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 16-16 (10-8, 6th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Chris Caputo

PS/G: 76.3 (67th of 363)

PA/G: 76.7 (337th of 363)

SRS: -1.93 (188th of 363)

SOS: -0.61 (155th of 363)

ORtg: 107.4 (101st of 363)

DRtg: 108.0 (317th of 363)
